title: Retinted: Regions Unexplored Waters
description:
Retints Waters of Regions Unexplored biomes. (REQUIRES POLYTONE MOD)
Part of the Retinted resource packs series.
body:
Recolors most of Regions Unexplored's biomes water to be a softer blue.
Not all biomes have been covered.
Goes best with Retinted: Vanilla Waters. The water colors from this resource pack might look off without it.

**Check out the Gallery for pictures.**

## _This Resource Pack Requires the Polytone mod to work!_
Polytone is a mod that allows resource pack creators to edit more things than usual, like water colors. I have also heard that Optifine works but I have not tested it.
